fields.description: Master toggle. When off, WorkBoard ignores leave applications and weekly off entirely and behaves as if neither existed.
fields.label: Enable Leave Awareness

fields.description: Daily recurring task rules will skip task creation on this day of the week (if the rule has 'Respects Weekly Off' enabled). Weekly/Monthly/Quarterly/Yearly rules still fire on their scheduled date even if it falls on the weekly off day.
fields.label: Weekly Off Day
fields.options:
Monday
Tuesday
Wednesday
Thursday
Friday
Saturday
Sunday

fields.description: Optional. If set, dates in this holiday list are treated as additional non-working days on top of the Weekly Off Day.
fields.label: Holiday List
